title: Italian Options Gold Glitter Snowflakes Green Satin Ribbon, Wide Wired Christmas Ribbon for Crafts, Gift Wrapping Accessories, Wreaths, Tree Decorations, Bows, Green, Gold, 63 mm x 10 Metre
features: WIRED-EDGE RIBBON: This luxurious green satin ribbon is adorned with large, glittery gold snowflakes. With a wired edge, it provides maximum hold and versatile styling options for decorative crafts and gift wrapping.

SATIN RIBBON: Measuring 63 mm x 10 metres, this super-soft, smooth ribbon has a beautiful texture and natural sheen. Made from double-faced satin, it’s fray-resistant and perfect for floral displays and handmade bows.

VERSATILE CRAFTS: A must-have for your craft supplies, this seasonal Christmas ribbon will elevate cosmetics, scented products, millinery, chocolates, gift wrapping, paper crafts, wreaths, bouquets, and hampers.

SAFETY ASSURED: Add a sprinkle of magic to every gift and decoration this Christmas with our premium ribbons. REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified, giving you peace of mind while making every celebration memorable.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
description: Add a touch of premium festive charm to any craft project with our gold glitter snowflake satin ribbon. Made from 100% polyester material, this luxury satin is adorned with large, glittery gold snowflakes. Its wired edging provides maximum hold and versatile styling options, adding structure and elegance to your creations. This seasonal ribbon is durable and versatile, ideal for a wide range of applications — from creating handmade bows, decorating gifts, wreaths, and hampers to embellishing craft projects — making every celebration unforgettable. Our premium seasonal ribbons are REACH-compliant (SVHC-free) and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified, ensuring the highest safety and quality standards. Established in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company specialising in high-quality craft supplies and event decorations, helping you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special occasions. Perfect for home crafters, DIYers, and event planners. Each satin ribbon measures 63 mm in width and is supplied on a 10-metre roll.
